items.title: Watford boss Gracia resigns after three months
items.summary: Javi Gracia resigns as Watford manager after just over three months in job.

items.title: VI Live: Van Persie gaat twee keer wisselen na horrorhelft in Eindhoven
items.summary: Zondagmiddag om 14.30 uur staat de topper tussen PSV en Feyenoord op het programma. PSV hoopt de concurrent een mokerslag uit te kunnen delen in de titelstrijd, terwijl de Rotterdammers de marge kunnen terugbrengen naar elf punten. Volg de wedstrijd op de voet in de VI Live.

items.title: Schott steals Bahrain Championship after thrilling play-off with Reed, Hill
items.summary: Freddy Schott won a thrilling Bahrain Championship after coming out on top in a three-way play-off against Patrick Reed and Calum Hill.

items.title: Van Polen kraakt Mokio bij tegengoal Excelsior: 'Laat zo man uit zijn rug lopen'
items.summary: Ajax gaf in een 'niets-aan-de-handwedstrijd' een comfortabele voorsprong uit handen. Het demasqué in Kralingen begon met de 2-1 van Excelsior, waarbij Jorthy Mokio zijn man liet lopen.

items.title: Manchester United v Fulham: Premier League – live
items.summary: ⚽️ Updates from the 2pm (GMT) kick-off at Old Trafford ⚽️ Live scores | Full table | Follow on Bluesky | Mail Luke Five minutes to kick off. Are you excited? The fan protest outside the stadium is presumably still in full swing: we’ll update you on that when we have more. Continue reading...

items.title: Man City v Chelsea: Women’s Super League – live
items.summary: ⚽️ Updates from the 2.30pm (GMT) kick-off at the Etihad ⚽️ Live scores | Full table | Follow on Bluesky | Mail Emillia After six consecutive years as champions, Chelsea find their once firm grip on the Women’s Super League crown has been reduced to a little finger clinging to the side of the trophy. They head to the Etihad Stadium on Sunday nine points behind their opponents and surely sensing that only a win could prevent the title from transferring to Manchester City’s outstretched arms. The big surprise here is the absence of Lucy Bronze for Chelsea. She has a ‘minor injury’, we are told. That’s a massive blow for the visitors. Manchester City, meanwhile, are overjoyed to welcome back Mary Fowler after her lengthy injury absence. Continue reading...

items.title: Bartley becomes Livingston boss as Martindale moves upstairs
items.summary: Marvin Bartley becomes Livingston manager with David Martindale taking up a new role as sporting director at the Scottish Premiership bottom club.

items.title: VI Live: Benita zet Heracles opnieuw op voorsprong, Real slikt gelijkmaker
items.summary: Welkom in de VI Live van zondag 1 februari. Hier nemen we je mee in drie Eredivisie-duels, een topper in Engeland en alle andere hoogtepunten op de (inter)nationale velden.

items.title: Excelsior blijkt angstgegner voor Ajax: 'Voelde dat er nog meer in zat'
items.summary: Excelsior ontwikkelt zich tot angstgegner voor Ajax. De Rotterdammers speelden zondagmiddag in eigen huis gelijk tegen de nummer vier van de Eredivisie. In de laatste vier wedstrijden lukte het Ajax al niet meer om te winnen van Excelsior.

items.title: Wolves accept reduced £48m offer for Strand Larsen
items.summary: Wolves have accepted a reduced offer worth £48m for striker Jorgen Strand Larsen from Crystal Palace.

items.title: Nog nooit vertoond: PSV trakteert Feyenoord op snelste 3-0 ooit
items.summary: Feyenoord is zondagmiddag rampzalig gestart aan de topper tegen PSV. Na zeventien minuten stonden de bezoekers al met 3-0 achter in het Philips Stadion. Iets wat Feyenoord nog nooit overkwam in de Eredivisie.

items.title: Kaid d'Authie downs Final Demand in shock result
items.summary: Kaid d'Authie upstaged his stablemate Final Demand to land the Ladbrokes Novice Chase at Leopardstown.

items.title: Szoboszlai: Liverpool future 'not in my hands'
items.summary: Liverpool midfielder Dominik Szoboszlai has admitted he would love to extend his stay at the club but said the decision is "not in [his] hands".

items.title: Chelsea and Strasbourg in talks to swap defenders
items.summary: Chelsea are in talks to recall Mamadou Sarr from Strasbourg, with Aaron Anselmino expected to move in the opposite direction.

items.title: Jacks finds breakthrough for England against Sri Lanka in second T20 LIVE!
0-2 at HT, 3-2 at FT! Chelsea in epic comeback win...
items.summary: Chelsea came from two goals down to seal a remarkable 3-2 victory over relegation-threatened West Ham United on Saturday.

items.title: Sources: Liverpool go for Sunderland's Geertruida
items.summary: Liverpool are interested in signing Netherlands international Lutsharel Geertruida on loan from RB Leipzig, sources have told ESPN.

items.title: Arsenal thrash Leeds to reinstate 7-point PL lead
items.summary: Arsenal have reinstated their seven-point lead at the top of the Premier League after a 4-0 win against Leeds United.

items.title: Barça boss Flick: Yamal can ‘reach another level’
items.summary: Yamal, 18, scored for the fourth time in five games as Barça extended their lead at the top of the table to four points.

items.title: Chelsea latest: Liverpool make contact with Blues target
